name: Asus Proart PA602 Case
highlights: ProArt PA602 Mid Tower Case is a professional-grade PC chassis designed for creators and power users, featuring support for EATX motherboards, dual 200 mm pre-installed front fans, and expansive cooling compatibility with up to 420 mm radiators
With its sleek tempered glass panel, high airflow design, and modern front I/O including USB 3
2 Gen 2×2 Type-C, the PA602 delivers performance, flexibility, and style for high-performance builds
description: Asus Proart PA602 Case Price in Pakistan Feature Specification Model ProArt PA602 Case Size Mid Tower Motherboard Support EATX (12″x10.9″), ATX, Micro-ATX, Mini-ITX, DTX, Mini-DTX Drive Bays 4 x 2.5″ Bay, 4 x 2.5″/3.5″ Combo Bay Expansion Slots 8 + 2 Vertical Front I/O Ports 2 x USB 3.2 Gen 11 x USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 Type-C2 x USB 2.0Fan Control ButtonReset Button Tempered Glass Left Side Panel Radiator Support (Top) 120 / 140 / 240 / 280 / 360 / 420 mm Cooling Suppo
